cardSource.name: Card source
cardSource.desc: Choose how to find flashcards for review: by tag or by folder location

folderName.name: Folder name
folderName.desc: Choose the folder path to use

isBlurFlashcardText.name: Blur flashcard text
isBlurFlashcardText.desc: Blur flashcard content in review list until mouse hover

openInPreviewMode.name: Open cards in reading mode
openInPreviewMode.desc: Open flashcards from review list in reading mode (preview). Important: enabling this setting is required for review buttons to appear on cards.

testsEnabled.name: Enable tests
testsEnabled.desc: Show test generation and the test review mode

testsFolderName.name: Tests folder
testsFolderName.desc: Folder where MemMaster will save generated tests

aiProvider.name: Generation provider
aiProvider.desc: Choose which provider API key should be used

openaiApiKey.name: OpenAI API key
openaiApiKey.desc: Used locally only when requesting test generation

openaiModel.name: OpenAI model
openaiModel.desc: OpenAI model used for test generation

deepseekApiKey.name: DeepSeek API key
deepseekApiKey.desc: Used locally only when requesting test generation

deepseekModel.name: DeepSeek model
deepseekModel.desc: DeepSeek model used for test generation

testClientPrompt.name: Client prompt
testClientPrompt.desc: Additional editable rules mixed into each test generation request

settings.hotkeysDesc: Configure keyboard shortcuts for quick card review. Set hotkeys in Settings > Hotkeys > MemMaster.

support.title: Need help?
support.desc: If you run into a problem, please

reviewFlashcard.lengthWarning: This note is {{count}}/{{limit}} characters. Shorter notes work better for review.
reviewFlashcard.completedReviewAction: This card is completed. Clear metadata to review it again.

reviewList.noSearchResults: No flashcards found matching your search.

notices.notAFlashcard: This document is not a flashcard
notices.alreadyFlashcard: This document is already a flashcard
notices.cardReset: Metadata cleared. This card can be reviewed again.
notices.missingApiKey: Add an API key for the selected provider in settings
